mapper.select:
select ar.id, ar.user_id, ar.bank_id, ar.total_score, ar.score, ar.answer_detail, ar.create_date,
ui.`name` AS userName, ui.images AS userImages,
qb.name AS bankName, qb.image AS bankImage from answer_record ar left join user_info ui on (ui.id = ar.user_id) left join question_bank qb on (qb.id = ar.bank_id) where 1 = 1
AND ui.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND qb.name = #{queryFrom.bankName}
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
order by ar.create_date desc
